mechanics.excerpt: Success means the animal is taking the training: Failure means the animal is not, and another Check must be made in the following month; After successful Animal Handling Check, second Check can be made t0 see the animal learns new command with the difficulty based on the complexity of the command: Success means the animal has learned the command; failure means nothing new was learned An animal can Iearn limited number of tricks depending on its intelligence_ at the gamemaster' dis cretion.
